name: Magic Shield
text: Negate the effect of the next magic card that targets the equipped creature. Once used, send the negated magic card and this card to the cemetery.

condition.text: Magic card targets the equipped creature

effects.actionText: Negate next targeting magic card and send both cards to cemetery

effects.value: Negate effect, send magic and this card to cemetery
